subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath seated Himself upon the Throne of Sinai and through His Word hath established the Path and set up the Balance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی استوی علی عرش الطور و نطق بکلمه بها نصب الصراط و وضع المیزان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
